The '''Vratixan blood eagle''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bird/Legends|bird]] native to the [[Jungle/Legends|rainforests]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. The birds had a wingspan of over four [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and were covered in waxy [[Color/Legends|red]] feathers. Blood eagles had curved, red beaks and huge talons that were able to grab a fully grown member of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="Strongholds" /> which grew to an average height of 1.8 meters.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref> The blood eagles flew over Thyferra's [[Tree/Legends|trees]] and [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] fields searching for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]]. When they found prey, the eagles dove and snatched it up. If the target possessed [[Armor/Legends|armor]], the eagles would use their beaks to beat it against rocks. Although the Vratix attempted to prevent the eagles from attacking them, [[Death/Legends|deaths]] still occurred during the alazhi harvest.<ref name="Strongholds" />

The [[LX-44 robotic leg/Legends|mechanical legs]] of [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|leader]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems']] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]], were jointed in a way that allowed them to grab and crush objects similarly to the [[Limb/Legends|feet]] of the Vratixan blood eagle.<ref name="RotSnovel">[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars:'' Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Vratixan blood eagle was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]] of the [[2005]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. The book was published the same year and written by [[Matthew Stover]].<ref name="RotSnovel" />
